caption: A man wearing a light blue long-sleeved button-down shirt and a dark blue tie sits at a large, polished wooden conference table in a formal office. Behind him are two Russian flags, one of which features a gold double-headed eagle emblem. In the upper right corner of each frame, a red and white logo contains the number "13". The man begins by leaning forward, looking down at a large open book on the table while resting his hand on its pages. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his weight, leaning further toward the right side of the table and reaching out with his right hand to touch or move an object on the desk. He remains focused on the documents before him throughout the clip. Two empty, beige high-backed chairs are visible beside and behind him, and a wooden door is partially visible in the background.
